faq.question: How long does it take to set up?
faq.answer: Most users are up and running in under 15 minutes. Enterprise setups with custom workflows take less than 24 hours.

faq.question: Do I need technical skills?
faq.answer: Not at all. Voiceover Studio is designed for non-technical users. Our templates handle the complexity.

faq.question: What if I need to cancel?
faq.answer: Cancel anytime with one click. No contracts, no penalties.

faq.question: Can I try before I buy?
faq.answer: Yes! Start with a free trial — no credit card required.

howItWorks.title: Set Up Your Workspace

howItWorks.title: Choose Your Workflow
howItWorks.description: Select from pre-built templates for voiceover production or create a custom workflow.

howItWorks.title: Deliver & Scale
howItWorks.description: Start delivering voiceover production at scale with AI-powered automation.

problemAgitate.problem: Manual voiceover production is costing you time and money
problemAgitate.agitate: Every hour you spend manually handling voiceover production is an hour you could be earning. Your competitors have already automated this and are pulling ahead.

dreamOutcome: Imagine automating your entire voiceover production workflow — delivering better results in half the time while your competitors struggle to keep up.
riskReversal: Try Voiceover Studio risk-free for 30 days. If you're not delivering better voiceover production faster, get a full refund.
scarcity: Limited-time: First 500 customers get 50% off annual plan
